boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operator execute this Energy / utilities / infrastructure controls action now? Action: critical customer prioritization outside approved outage plan. Boundary: priority request cannot alter outage plan alone.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Current control record closes the exact boundary.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open defect in source records remains.

final_answer: Action may proceed. The exact current control record confirms the critical customer registry and outage plan priority match is current, exact, and tied to this requested action. The packet closes the boundary through source-control records, and the communication boundary cannot override that control evidence.
